name: The Drifting Verdict
specialty: Expertise in deciphering and manipulating ancient texts, known for solving complex puzzles that baffle others

members.name: Arin Alistair
members.note: Sporting a missing eye, a reminder of a near-fatal rift encounter

members.name: Zara Ironroot
members.note: Known for her intimidating presence, often softened by a wry smile

members.name: Elias Whisperwing
members.note: Rumored to have an exceptional connection to the city's shadows, often disappearing without a trace

visual: Clad in cloaks of muted gray and crimson, they are often seen with scrolls and ancient tomes, carrying themselves with an air of quiet authority and mystery.
reputation_note: Whispers of a team that can uncover hidden truths and navigate the city's darkest secrets have made them both feared and respected in the Undercity
history: [2026-03-16] Completed a investigation-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+1/5)
